name: 基础人体学习软件
short_description: 一款基础人体结构的学习软件
detailed_description:
The basic knowledge of human body structure has been systematically divided into blocks.

1. Try to use models to record the difficulties in learning, so that students can have a more intuitive understanding of the proportion relationship of the human body.

2. Simplify complex structures as much as possible to facilitate student memory.

3. Created interactive exercises in space to understand the derivation of bone points and space.

4. Created a basic texture ball to provide beginners with a refined visual approach.
